feedback.text: Hi I am a gamer for a long time games have given to me; Joy, challenge, frustration, bepuzzlement, clarity, satisfaction after over come some puzzles, obstacles, or bosses. And in recent times, Gaming Companies and Puplishers have shutdown and made it difficult to access, alot of Successfull Games last 5-10 years then suddenly you can't play the game you bought at; 50, 60, 70, 80 or 90 because Companies and Puplishers inserted third party code, trademarks, other stuff that ultimately makes the games not playable. unfortunately that is what Companies and Puplishers end goal is i saw bit by bit Gamers rights got grinded down by moving to digital, Games can be plucked from your Gaming library at any moment, microtransactions everywhere distracting and disrupting gameplay. having essential mechanics unlocking behind said microtransactions and etc. I am worried that my games in my steam library just disappear suddenly and I am not only one with this concerns, it already is and has happened to others like the crew, Ace Combat 6: Fires of liberation, age of empires: Castle Siege, AirMech Arena, Amazing world, Angry Birds GO!, Apex Legends Mobile etc. I believe that align to stop killing games can improve the conditions to the customers, consumers and gamers so we can rest more easily then before, at least i would be.
